reviews.review_description:
I really like how this app was made, it reminds me to Dating Apps in the smartphone I really hope that this app keep improving, adding some features to make it better.
Congrats on bring to the VR store an app like this.
Cheers!

I was told about this app while playing Horizon, and I decided to try it out. It is an amazing app! This is actually a really good idea, meet people 1 on 1, but in VR. I love the hand tracking, and the stars system. You should try it out if you haven't already

reviews.review_title: fresh new concept for chatting in VR
reviews.review_description:
What I find great about Paire:
- Use of Meta Avatar 
- Hand tracking!!! 🙂 - with special gesture effects cool.
- Mini games to get to know each other
- automatic adjustment of the HUB's height (automatic sitting)
- mirror to see yourself in the "lobby

What I miss about Paire:
- atmospheric environments (Vtime XR does a great job of this... appealing graphics with moving details and atmospheric soundscape
- (at least a few) optional filter options for who you want to be paired with (e.g. age, gender, continent/country, hobbies; probably more interesting for more users?!) 
- write a short profile that can be displayed above the avatar to talk directly about special hobbies or interests... this could also be done without an own account via the cloud backup of Meta?
- further develop special gestures for hand tracking (so cool!)
- A kind of "friends list" to meet again after having already met each other.... Could then also become a kind of dating platform in the long term, at least as an optional section (I don't know where you want to go here in the long term... but either way, a kind of friends list apart from the completely random meeting would be really great!
- in general, but especially in the text-intensive mini-games, try to work with illustrations or pictograms! The eye eats with you. It's also more entertaining 🙂
- Passthrough?! At least for Campria and Quest 3 would be really nice to have....
- Optional group chat via invitation by host (compare with V time XR)

Thank you for checking out Paire! My cofounder and I put our hearts into this, so it means the world to us to have your support.

If you'd like to speak to me directly and share ideas on how to make this app better, please join our discord: https://discord.gg/ePm35y9yu8

See you in Paire!

reviews.review_title: Seems like a really cool idea
reviews.review_description:
I love the idea of this.
But I haven't been able to successfully load into the app yet. 
- Edit: i loaded in fine today but there wasn’t many people online. Hopefully it will take off and be easier to pair up in the future.
I really think this app figured out something. Just needs a bit more users to get the ball rolling. After that, sky's the limit.
This app has a very relaxing, polished vista to chill in while chatting with random people. It is the perfect low-stakes environment for learning to hold conversations and overcoming social anxiety!
